payload.text:
We'll connect your Telegram account as the owner, then you'll authorize a channel.

Subscriber counts stay private — never shared or sold.

name: Onboard connect then link channel pending

payload.text:
You're connected as the owner. Next, authorize a channel.

Add this bot as an admin (post messages), then send the channel @username or numeric id.

Send the channel @username or id (example: @mychannel).

You must already be able to add bots as admin there.

Saved @demo_channel as pending.

Couldn't verify admin access yet. Add this bot as a channel admin with post rights, then tap Verify — or set the subscriber count manually.

name: Onboard set subscriber count for 10k channel

payload.text: Send the current subscriber count as a number (e.g. 10000). Used for the 20% reaction target.

Updated @big_channel to 10,000 subscribers.
At 20% target that's 2,000 reactions per job.
